sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63762" key="logomu/qion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λογο-μύθιον</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n63762.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fabulous legend</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:123" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.123</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
